name: Cocolat Walnut Torte
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 12
1. In a heavy saucepan over low heat, melt the broken chocolate with butter, stirring constantly until smooth. Set aside to cool slightly.
2. Beat egg yolks for 1 to 2 minutes. Gradually add 1/2 cup sugar and vanilla extract.
3. Add the cooled chocolate mixture to the egg yolk mixture.
4. Fold in flour and ground walnuts.
5. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites until foamy. Gradually add remaining 1/2 cup sugar and cream of tartar, beating until stiff peaks form.
6. Blend one-fourth of the beaten egg whites into the chocolate mixture, then fold in the remaining egg whites.
7. Pour batter into a lined 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 375°F for 30 to 35 minutes or until the sides start to separate from the pan but the center is still moist. Cool on a rack.
8. Remove torte from the pan and frost with Cocolat Rum Glaze (recipe separate).
